name: Checkbox
description: A customizable checkbox component with support for controlled/uncontrolled states, indeterminate state, and checkbox groups.
usage_guidelines: Use for binary choices or multi-select options in forms.
Use within CheckboxGroup for related options that can be selected together.
Set indeterminate for parent checkboxes representing partial selection.
Provide clear labels as children for accessibility.
Use controlled (checked prop) or uncontrolled (defaultChecked) based on your state management needs.

checkboxClass.description: Additional CSS classes for the checkbox input element.

defaultChecked.description: Default checked state for uncontrolled component.

indeterminate.description: Shows indeterminate state (dash icon) for partial selection.

name.description: Input name attribute for form submission.

onChange.description: Callback fired when checkbox state changes.

readOnly.description: Makes checkbox read-only (visible but not interactive).

value.description: Checkbox value used in checkbox groups.

styling_info.visual_description: A square checkbox with rounded corners, showing a checkmark when checked or a dash when indeterminate. Uses primary color for checked state. Includes smooth transitions and hover effects.

Do: Always provide descriptive labels as children
Use indeterminate for parent checkboxes in hierarchical selections
Dont: Don't use for mutually exclusive options (use Radio instead)
Don't forget to provide labels for accessibility
Don't use both checked and defaultChecked simultaneously
